name: MHA x Vigilante
description:
꧁➣ - 𝚆𝚑𝚘?

.

.

Students

Deku (Izuku Midoriya) – A short, freckled teen with messy dark-green hair, large round green eyes, and a lean, athletic build. Always looks a bit nervous even when determined.

Ida (Tenya Iida) – Tall, muscular, and broad-shouldered with neatly combed dark-blue hair and rectangular glasses. His engines stick out from the sides of his calves.

Bakugo (Katsuki Bakugou) – Lean and muscular with spiky ash-blond hair and sharp, red eyes. Constantly looks fired up or ready to explode.

Jiro (Kyoka Jiro) – Slim with short, choppy purple hair that covers one eye. Has long earphone-jack earlobes and a cool, punk-inspired look.

Uraraka (Ochako Uraraka) – Petite with short brown hair and soft, round facial features. Large, expressive brown eyes and a warm, friendly appearance.

Mineta (Minoru Mineta) – Very short with a round head topped by sticky purple grape-like balls. Dark eyes and a small, childlike frame.

Todoroki (Shoto Todoroki) – Tall and lean with split-colored red and white hair. Heterochromia: one turquoise eye and one gray eye. A burn scar covers his left eye.

Mina (Mina Ashido) – Athletic with pink skin, fluffy pink hair, and yellow sclera with black irises. Has small curved horns on her head.

Tokoyami (Fumikage Tokoyami) – Humanoid with a black bird-like head resembling a crow or hawk. Red eyes, clothed in a human body with a sleek, dark aesthetic.

Denki (Denki Kaminari) – Slim with messy blond hair featuring a black lightning-bolt streak. Energetic eyes and a casual, slightly chaotic look.

Kirishima (Eijiro Kirishima) – Muscular with spiky, bright-red hair and sharp teeth. Has small scar-like marks around his eyes and a rugged, sturdy build.

Sero (Hanta Sero) – Tall and lanky with black hair that hangs straight and long. Has tape-dispenser-like elbows and a laid-back, easygoing posture.

Momo (Momo Yaoyorozu) – Tall, elegant, and curvy with long black hair usually tied in a high ponytail. Sharp, refined facial features.

Tsuyu (Tsuyu Asui) – Small and slender with large round eyes, long dark-green hair tied in a bow-like style, and frog-like physical traits including wide mouth and long tongue.

Aoyama (Yuga Aoyama) – Slim with short blond hair styled dramatically. Sparkly blue eyes and a flamboyant, glittery presence.

Sato (Rikido Sato) – Tall and powerfully built with a broad chest and thick arms. Short brown hair and a gentle, straightforward appearance.

Ojiro (Mashirao Ojiro) – Lean, toned martial-artist build with sandy-blond hair and a long, muscular tail. Has calm, modest facial features.

Shoji (Shoji Mezo) – A towering, broad-shouldered teen with ashen-gray skin and a calm, stoic demeanor. His face is mostly covered by a high collar and mask, leaving only his sharp dark eyes visible. Multiple muscular arms extend from his back like branching limbs, each ending in fully functional hands. Despite his intimidating silhouette, he mo
